ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact telephone number for the institution */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., University, College, Community College) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asl_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASL requirement record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "admission_requirement" INTEGER /* Indicates if ASL study satisfies admission requirements */,
  "graduation_requirement" INTEGER /* Indicates if ASL study satisfies graduation requirements */,
  "years_of_study" INTEGER /* Number of years of ASL study required */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or exceptions */,
  "requirement_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ASL study requirements */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the requirement is effective */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asl_requirements_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major/minor */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major/minor */,
  "has_additional_language_requirement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the major/minor has additional foreign language requirements */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the major */,
  "major_description" TEXT /* Description of the major/minor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact telephone number for the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the student is interested in */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major/minor the student is interested in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Status of any disabilities (e.g., deaf, hard of hearing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the student applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the admission application */,
  "application_fee" TEXT /* Fee paid for the application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the admission decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduations" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date when the student is expected to graduate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the graduation */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Any honors received (e.g., Cum Laude) */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASL course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the ASL course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the ASL course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the ASL course */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_courses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
